seoTitle: Runcorn vs Rungoo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Runcorn and Rungoo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Runcorn and Rungoo.
heading: Runcorn vs Rungoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Runcorn, Queensland and Rungoo, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rungoo has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Runcorn (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Runcorn or Rungoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Runcorn has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Rungoo scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Runcorn scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Rungoo scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Runcorn or Rungoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rungoo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
